headline: I asked where our meat came from. The answer changed everything.
subhead: A letter from our founder on why we built a grocery store where every product has a farm name on it.
hero_copy:
My youngest asked me where chicken comes from. I said the supermarket. She meant the actual chicken.

I did not know the farm. I did not know how the bird was raised, what it ate, or how far it had travelled. I just knew it came in a plastic tray and I bought it every week.

So I started looking. What I found changed the way I feed my family.

sections.heading: What I found
sections.body:
Industry data suggests supermarket beef can travel around 2,400 kilometres before reaching the shelf. It might sit in cold storage for weeks. The farmer who raised it earns a fraction of what you pay.

But right here in NSW, there are regenerative farms producing extraordinary food. Rachel's Farm in Kempsey raises 100% grass-fed cattle on pasture. Farmer Brown's hens roam free. Collins Wild Caught brings in wild-caught Alaskan salmon from the South Coast. These farmers exist. Most families just have no way to buy from them.

sections.heading: What I built
sections.body:
FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store. You order online from named regenerative farms in NSW. Your food goes from the farm to our Brookvale hub. You collect it Monday to Friday.

Zero middlemen. No commitment. The food is days old, not weeks. The farmer earns a fairer price. You know exactly where every product came from because we show you.

sections.heading: The food speaks for itself
sections.body:
100% grass-fed beef raised without hormones or feedlots. Wild-caught Alaskan salmon. Pork from Bundarra Farm. Biodynamic dairy from Paris Creek. Eggs from Farmer Brown.

Every product traces to a named farm. That is the promise. We will show you where your food comes from.

sections.heading: Be part of it
sections.body:
We are launching an equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal in mid-2026. Minimum investment: $50. Cap: $10,000 per investor.

A $5 refundable deposit gets you VIP access: first in when the campaign opens, priority updates, and an exclusive Q&A.

We cannot promise returns. Early-stage investing carries real risk. Full details will be in the disclosure document on Birchal.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero: candid shot of founder in a kitchen with family, natural light, warm tones. Below-fold: simple illustrated supply chain showing farm to hub to family. Named farm partner photos. Brookvale hub lifestyle shot. First-person letter tone throughout. Should feel like reading a personal note, not a sales page.
